pred_reason: The contract contains a critical reentrancy vulnerability in transferFrom (SWC-107) and multiple arithmetic/edge-case issues that could lead to integer-related vulnerabilities (SWC-101). These findings are consistent across multiple analysis tasks. Evidence: Reentrancy confirmed in transferFrom function (Finding 1,3); SafeMath usage present but edge-case issues in rebase() (Finding 8,9); State changes after external calls violate checks-effects-interactions (Finding 6)

raw.pred_reason: The contract contains a critical reentrancy vulnerability in transferFrom (SWC-107) and multiple arithmetic/edge-case issues that could lead to integer-related vulnerabilities (SWC-101). These findings are consistent across multiple analysis tasks. Evidence: Reentrancy confirmed in transferFrom function (Finding 1,3); SafeMath usage present but edge-case issues in rebase() (Finding 8,9); State changes after external calls violate checks-effects-interactions (Finding 6)
